title: assertCanAssignRole executes 4 DB queries when the caller is not ADMIN (resolveTemplateKey called twice in assertCanAssignRole + twice again in canAssignRole)
DELETE /tasks/:taskId/raci/:userId/:role — :role path param is unvalidated (no ParseEnumPipe)
Unauthenticated health endpoint reveals per-component infrastructure status (DB/Redis) to any caller
API proxy forwards `host` header to internal backend (host-header injection)
Login/register: JWT stored in localStorage before permissions fetch — broken auth state on network error
handleUpdateProject has no error handling — silent failure on project update
onArchive / onUnarchive in projects/page.tsx have no error handling
fetchProjects useCallback missing hasPermission dependency — stale permission closure
ProjectsDetailTable: Link href and router.push use locale-less paths, breaking client-side navigation
usersService.getAll() in telework/page.tsx has no .catch() — silent failure in user selector
handleExportExcel fires Promise.all over all active clients without concurrency cap (up to 200 requests)
milestonesService.getAll() fetches ALL milestones system-wide then filters client-side in two pages
AdvancedAnalyticsTab creates a module-scope QueryClient inside its own QueryClientProvider, bypassing the app-level cache
cat: performance · isolated TanStack Query cache / module-scope QueryClient anti-pattern

title: 13 controllers have no sibling *.spec.ts file
analytics.controller.spec.ts has only happy-path tests — no error/auth failure coverage
events.controller.spec.ts, clients.controller.spec.ts, and third-parties.controller.spec.ts have zero error-path tests
LeaveTypesService.reorder() method has zero test coverage — $transaction branch untested
planning-export.controller.spec.ts has only happy-path tests — no error propagation tests
Root-level e2e specs use UI login helper with hardcoded admin/admin123 credentials
api-permissions.spec.ts — the core RBAC matrix test has zero @smoke tags despite covering all permission codes
DOCUMENT_DOWNLOADED action is defined but wired to no emitter (binary egress unobservable)
DAT-021 hash-chain recompute is operator-manual with no CI/migration guard that it executed
audit_logs advisory lock serialises ALL audit writes globally — creates a bottleneck under concurrent mutations
planning.getOverview loads up to 1000 users and 1000 leaves in a single blocking request
UserSkill.validatedBy is an untyped String? with no FK to users — dangling reference risk
getRequestId() has zero call sites: ALS request-ID never reaches audit payloads or structured logs
settings.controller.ts has no controller spec (8 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
leave-types.controller.ts has no controller spec (7 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
rbac/roles.controller.ts has no controller spec (6 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
analytics-advanced.controller.ts has no controller spec (6 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
e2e/leaves.spec.ts: tautological assertions — test always passes even when page is broken
e2e/planning.spec.ts: two `expect(true).toBeTruthy()` assertions — tests can never fail
e2e/tasks.spec.ts: task-list test swallows selector failure and asserts only URL
5 legacy E2E specs use UI login (helpers.ts) instead of API-based storageState
All app pages are 'use client' — no RSC, no TanStack Query, no incremental hydration
scripts/backup-database.sh produces unencrypted .gz dumps with no restore-verification step
Analytics cache has no mutation invalidation — stale data served for up to 60s after changes
captureSnapshots() uses server-local midnight instead of UTC midnight for deduplication query
nginx forwards client-supplied X-Forwarded-Proto ($http_x_forwarded_proto) instead of $scheme, enabling proto spoofing
cat: security · Header injection / Proxy header spoofing

title: No Strict-Transport-Security header emitted by nginx, web middleware, or API helmet
25 CREATE INDEX statements in dat011_fk_indexes run without CONCURRENTLY — ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock on every indexed table
AUDIT_HASH_KEY never set in CI — API cannot boot in E2E jobs
CI e2e-smoke and e2e-tests jobs start the API without AUDIT_HASH_KEY, causing assertAuditHashKey() to abort in all environments
cat: security · Missing AUDIT_HASH_KEY in CI — E2E API startup will crash

title: Committed nginx.conf has no :443 TLS block; live TLS is terminated by an out-of-repo host nginx (IaC drift) and HSTS is absent
clients.spec.ts Suite 6 asserts HTTP 200 for contributeur on GET /api/clients, contradicting the permission matrix and the generated INTERDIT test
nginx sets X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN but CSP sets frame-ancestors: 'none' — conflicting framing policies
nginx rate limiting applies only to /api — frontend / and /_next/static locations are unthrottled
AUDIT_HASH_KEY is absent from .env.production.example and from init-env.sh output
docker-compose.prod.yml uses deprecated ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var instead of canonical CORS_ORIGIN
JWT_ACCESS_TTL undocumented in prod template — effective access token TTL is 7d not 15m as SEC-019 assumes
findAll: default limit is 1000 but page default is 1 — no hard cap when limit param is omitted via service default
findAll comments uses default limit=1000 — very high default page size
captureSnapshots fetches ALL active projects with full task/milestone arrays — no pagination
CreateLeaveDto.reason and ImportLeaveDto.comment lack @MaxLength, allowing oversized free-text storage
description fields lack @MaxLength on CreateProjectDto, CreateEpicDto, CreateMilestoneDto
generateResetToken() logs PASSWORD_CHANGED (wrong action) — action mislabeling confirmed, non-persistence claim refuted
expect(res.statusCode).not.toBe(401) in uploads-auth.hook.spec.ts passes on 200/500/404 — intent is ambiguous
describe.skipIf in leaves-balance-gating.int.spec.ts silently disables mutation witness in default CI
listProjectClients, listTaskAssignees, listProjectMembers return empty list for non-existent parent — should return 404
milestones complete() bypasses project membership authorization check
PATCH/DELETE recurring-rules/:id routes lack @OwnershipCheck decorator (rely solely on service-layer check)
update() recurrenceEndDate child-prune runs outside the update transaction, creating a window where pruned children exist alongside a committed new endDate
cat: correctness · business_invariant — recurrenceEndDate prune outside transaction

title: importLeaves catch block resets result.created=0 but not result.skipped — error response reports misleading skipped count after full tx rollback
SettingsService.bulkUpdate performs sequential un-transacted upserts — partial failure leaves inconsistent state
auth.service register() and users.service create(): duplicate-check race condition surfaces as 500 instead of 409 when two concurrent registrations collide on the DB unique constraint
epics.service update()/remove(): double-read TOCTOU — epic fetched in membership check then again in findOne()
addParticipant uses check-then-create pattern susceptible to race; duplicate concurrent request leaks P2002 as HTTP 500
cat: correctness · race_condition — TOCTOU on unique constraint

title: milestones.service update()/remove(): same double-read TOCTOU as epics — unhandled P2025 on concurrent delete
roles.service createRole()/updateRole(): isDefault singleton management is non-atomic — two concurrent requests can create two roles with isDefault=true
SettingsService.remove throws unhandled Prisma P2025 for non-existent non-default keys
SnapshotsQueryDto.projectIds and TasksBreakdownQueryDto.projectIds have no array size limit — unbounded IN-clause fan-out
JwtStrategy.validate makes a full user.findUnique on every authenticated request
findAll documents uses default limit=1000 — very high default page size
holidays findAll: unbounded findMany — no limit, no pagination
getOwnLeaves: unbounded findMany on leave history — no limit
findAll leaves: default limit 1000 with effective cap 500 — higher than recommended 100
findAssignments (predefined-tasks): no pagination and no maximum result cap
findRecurringRules: no pagination — unbounded findMany with includes
findAll school-vacations: unbounded findMany — no pagination for year-scoped list
getSkillsMatrix() loads all active users and all skills without pagination — response size grows as O(users × skills)
findAll time-tracking: effective cap is 1000 rows — far exceeds recommended 100
validateImport fetches ALL users (email+login) for duplicate detection — unbounded full-table scan
recomputeChainFrom() issues one UPDATE per audit row in a serial for-loop — O(N) round-trips hold the advisory lock for the full duration
leave-types reorder: N individual update queries instead of bulk upsert
settings.service `initializeDefaultSettings` issues N×2 sequential DB queries at every module init
QueryClientsDto.search and QueryThirdPartyDto.search missing @MaxLength — unbounded query string parameter
CreateDocumentDto.description missing @MaxLength — unbounded free-text field
CreateDocumentDto.size missing @IsInt() and @Min(0) — negative or non-integer values accepted
projectId query filter in epics/milestones findAll not validated as UUID
CreateEventDto.description has no @MaxLength — unbounded DB write
GET /holidays/import-french: year query param parsed via parseInt without range bounds or ParseIntPipe
ImportLeaveDto.userEmail uses @IsString/@IsNotEmpty instead of @IsEmail, and CreateLeaveDto.leaveTypeId / ImportLeaveDto lack @IsUUID
cat: security · input validation / missing format check

title: Milestone bulk import array has no @ArrayMaxSize — DoS via oversized payload
Unvalidated date query strings passed to new Date() in exportIcs — possible HTTP 500 instead of 400
CreatePredefinedTaskDto free-text fields (name, description, color, icon) lack @MaxLength
managerId and sponsorId in CreateProjectDto use @IsString instead of @IsUUID
visibleStatuses in UpdateProjectDto uses @IsString (not @IsEnum) allowing arbitrary status strings
departmentId query parameter in GET /services and GET /skills/matrix is not validated as UUID — invalid values cause DB-level errors surfaced as 500
cat: security · input-validation / missing UUID pipe on query param

title: UpdateSettingDto.value and .description lack @MaxLength — unbounded strings stored to DB
description fields in CreateSkillDto, CreateDepartmentDto, CreateServiceDto have no @MaxLength
ImportSkillDto.name and .description lack @MaxLength — inconsistent with CreateSkillDto which enforces @MaxLength(100)
ImportTaskDto.assigneeEmail has no @IsEmail — email validation is done by case-insensitive Map lookup instead
CreateThirdPartyDto.contactEmail missing @MaxLength
description field in CreateTimeEntryDto lacks @MaxLength constraint
CreateUserDto.login and ImportUserDto.login missing @MaxLength — unbounded login field
getUsersPresence accepts arbitrary dateStr with no format validation — invalid date causes NaN Date passed to $queryRaw
comments: create/update/delete emit no audit_log row
events: create/update/delete and participant mutations emit no audit_log row
Project member add/update/remove emit no audit rows
audit_logs actorId FK retains ON UPDATE CASCADE after migration removes ON DELETE CASCADE — asymmetry can trigger immutability violation
project_members.allocation has no CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 100 — negative or impossible percentages accepted
tasks.progress and epics.progress have no CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 100 — negative or >100 values accepted
time_entries.hours has no CHECK for positive value or daily cap — zero and negative entries accepted
leaves.days has no CHECK > 0 — zero-day and negative leave records accepted
tasks.startTime, tasks.endTime, events.startTime, events.endTime stored as TEXT without format validation at DB level
events.recurrenceDay has no CHECK constraint — invalid day-of-week/month values silently accepted
password_reset_tokens.createdById CASCADE — deleting admin who created token cascades to delete active token
predefined_tasks.defaultDuration and predefined_task_assignments.period stored as TEXT — any string accepted
telework_recurring_rules.dayOfWeek and predefined_task_recurring_rules.dayOfWeek have no CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 6
documents.contentSha256 is TEXT with no CHECK constraint — any arbitrary string can be stored as a SHA-256 hash
TeleworkSchedule: no index on (userId, date) range queries — only unique constraint
PredefinedTaskAssignment has no index on predefinedTaskId — per-task assignment lookups may seq-scan
daysFromNow in MilestonesCompletionService uses fixed MS_PER_DAY, off-by-one across DST transitions
getUsersPresence(): setHours(0,0,0,0) uses local server timezone — presence window is offset when Node.js process timezone differs from UTC
req.body.login not in Fastify redact paths — user identifier would appear in logs if body serialization is enabled
Stdout audit log uses unkeyed plain SHA256 (8 chars) for attempted-login identifier — rainbow-table reversible for common emails
uploads-auth.hook.ts skips jti blacklist and nbf checks — logged-out tokens remain valid for avatar reads up to access TTL
CSP policy missing `object-src 'none'` and `base-uri 'self'` directives
Dev docker-compose.yml exposes Redis (6379) and PostgreSQL (5432) on all host interfaces without authentication
SnapshotSchedulerService creates a Redis connection in constructor with no shutdown hook
Login/register pages fetch `/auth/me/permissions` redundantly — useAuthBootstrap does this on every mount
Profile 'Preferences' tab has a Save button with no onClick handler — button does nothing
fetchThirdPartyMembers and fetchProjectClients close over canRead* flags but effect deps are suppressed
reports/page.tsx: canView = !permissionsLoaded || hasPermission('reports:view') — the !permissionsLoaded branch is dead code
UsersPage: role filter useEffect fires a redundant re-fetch on initial mount when roleFilter='' and availableRoles just loaded
cat: correctness · race condition in role filter re-fetch

title: No error boundary anywhere in the [locale] subtree — unhandled render errors crash the entire app
Profile page (`profile/page.tsx`) has no error boundary — uncaught render errors cause a blank screen
No error boundary wrapping any of the three page-level components
Six advanced analytics endpoints have no caching despite being identical in contract to the cached main analytics endpoint
CacheService uses TTL-only eviction — no mutation invalidation for analytics endpoints
findByUser() (GET /personal-todos) issues an unconditional DELETE on every read — unnecessary write roundtrip on each list call
All 6 pages use manual fetch + useState with no TanStack Query caching — repeated fetches on every navigation
planning/page.tsx is entirely a shell that could be an RSC with a single client import
No migration-level e2e test exists inside e2e/; schema-constraint coverage lives only in apps/api/src/schema-constraints/*.int.spec.ts
$executeRawUnsafe used with string-interpolated constant for DDL trigger name — unsafe API pattern in maintenance scripts
captureSnapshots() uses hardcoded string literal 'ACTIVE' instead of ProjectStatus enum
update(): progress not recalculated when status changes and subtasks exist
RefreshTokenDto missing @MaxLength — unbounded refresh token in POST /auth/refresh
CreateLeaveDto.leaveTypeId uses @IsString() instead of @IsUUID()
CreateEpicDto.description and CreateMilestoneDto.description missing @MaxLength
No declared retention policy or partitioning for audit_logs; unbounded table growth
project_snapshots.progress has no DB-level floor CHECK (>= 0) — Decimal(5,2) admits negatives
CI workflow hardcodes DB password and JWT secret in plaintext — appropriate for ephemeral CI but not using GitHub Secrets
No OpenTelemetry or distributed tracing; requestId correlation stops at the API layer
planning.controller.ts has no controller spec (1 endpoint, @RequirePermissions)
personal-todos.controller.ts has no controller spec (@AllowSelfService on all 4 endpoints)
holidays.controller.ts has no controller spec (9 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
school-vacations.controller.ts has no controller spec (6 endpoints, all @RequirePermissions)
Three sub-controllers have no specs: projects-clients, projects-third-party-members, tasks-third-party-assignees
e2e/tests/avatar-screenshots.spec.ts: 8 tests with zero assertions (screenshot-only)
e2e/tests/kanban.spec.ts: two unconditional test.skip(true, ...) due to seed-dependency
METRICS_TOKEN not documented in env templates — metrics endpoint is open by default
console.error() in UsersService.create() bypasses NestJS Logger and Fastify log redaction
console.warn() in SettingsService.onModuleInit() bypasses NestJS Logger
fetchManagersAndDepartments called on every Create button click — not cached between invocations
validateImport (tasks): end <= start is classified as a warning, but create() rejects end < start as an error — inconsistent boundary semantics
getEventsByRange and findOne RBAC filter defaults to unscoped on null role — inconsistent with findAll
getLeaveBalance: Promise.all fan-out issues N×2 DB queries, one resolveAllocatedDays per leave type
ICS import processes unbounded VEVENT count with sequential DB writes and no per-field length cap
dat037 cascade UPDATE of task.projectId produces no audit_logs rows — N tasks silently rewritten under Cour-des-Comptes scope
password_reset_tokens index (userId, usedAt) is non-partial — hot query path WHERE usedAt IS NULL will scan all rows including consumed tokens
CI pipeline has no real VPS deployment step — 'notify-success' job only echoes, docker-publish does not SSH to prod
Permission matrix has no entry for GET /api/analytics/advanced/* endpoints (6 routes using reports:view)
PermissionsGuardV2 deny due to missing decorator (uncovered route in enforce mode) logs but does not audit
AuditLog has no index on createdAt+id — ORDER BY createdAt DESC, id DESC scans the full table
User.roleId remains nullable — users without a role bypass RBAC entirely
Event.recurrenceDay, TeleworkRecurringRule.dayOfWeek, and PredefinedTaskRecurringRule.dayOfWeek have no BETWEEN 0 AND 6 DB CHECK
PredefinedTaskRecurringRule.weekInterval, monthlyOrdinal, monthlyDayOfMonth and Event.recurrenceWeekInterval have no DB-level range CHECKs
startTime/endTime string columns have no DB CHECK enforcing endTime >= startTime
ProjectMember.startDate/endDate has no date-ordering CHECK (endDate >= startDate)
AppController GET / exposes docs and internal API endpoint list publicly without auth
e2e/tests/reports/analytics-advanced.spec.ts: no RBAC denial test for contributeur/observateur
73 migrations total; 50 have no dedicated integration spec (only schema-constraint-named ones covered)
